channel.title: Dirty Laundry
channel.description: Latest releases from Dirty Laundry on Dropout.tv

item.title: Who Got Yelled at by a Real Housewife?
item.description:
Izzy, Emily, Danielle, and Siobhan drink algonquins and team up against each other.

Duration: 49:38

Tags: Dirty Laundry, lily du, grant o'brien, talk shows, competitions, drinking, never have i ever, embarrassing, terrible things, izzy roland, emily axford, danielle radford, siobhan thompson
